creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
Day or Night? 🌇🌃 
Whatever time you prefer, these Dubai tourist spots are a sight to behold.

• Burj Khalifa 
📍 Best spot to view the world’s tallest building is from everywhere in Downtown Dubai. Video clip in this reel was taken at Tabu restaurant.
🌇 Daytime is great for photo ops.
🌃 Night is when the magic happens! You can watch the light show and the Dubai fountain show for free. 

• Burj Al Arab
📍This sail-shaped hotel is a Dubai icon! Video was filmed at Souk Madinat terrace (free entry) near Costa coffee shop.
🌇 Majestic during the day.
🌃 Elegantly lit with twinkling lights and colorful projections at night.

• Museum of the Future
📍 This is the most beautiful building in the world! Video taken at 25H hotel terrace near Monkey Bar.
🌇 Admire the stunning futuristic structure inside and out. Visiting time at 10 AM to 7:30 PM. 
🌃 Be mesmerized by the museum’s exterior lights. 

• Atlantis The Palm
📍 The “crown” of Palm Jumeirah! Video taken at The Pointe beach area (free entry).
🌇 Enjoy the fun and family-friendly atmosphere at daytime.
🌃 Have a dinner date in one of the romantic restaurants. 

• Global Village
📍 This is Dubai’s top winter attraction! Opening hours is at 4PM until midnight. Ticket costs 27 AED per person.
🌇 Best time to walk around the pavilions and take tons of photos for the gram. :)
🌃 Watch the shows and taste different food from around the world! 

Tag your travel buddies! 

#ladyandhersweetescapes #Dubai #UAE #DubaiBlogger #UAEBlogger #DubaiDestinations #myDubai #VisitDubai
